ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "product_type" TEXT /* Categorize products by type (e.g., Microcontroller, Sensor) */,
  "product_line" TEXT /* Group products by product line */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the product */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Last modification date of the product */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_setups" (
  "setup_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test setup */,
  "setup_name" TEXT /* Name of the test setup */,
  "setup_description" TEXT /* Description of the test setup */,
  "setup_type" TEXT /* Categorize setups by type (e.g., Production, Quality Assurance) */,
  "setup_status" TEXT /* Track the status of the setup (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Last modification date of the setup */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the setup */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setup_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "jtag_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each JTAG configuration */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the configuration is for */,
  "setup_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test setup the configuration is for */,
  "configuration_name" TEXT /* Name of the JTAG configuration */,
  "configuration_version" TEXT /* Version of the JTAG configuration */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date the configuration was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the configuration */,
  "configuration_status" TEXT /* Track the status of the configuration (e.g., Draft, Active, Archived) */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Last modification date of the configuration */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jtag_configurations_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jtag_configurations_setup_id FOREIGN KEY ("setup_id") REFERENCES test_setups ("setup_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jtag_configurations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, test technician, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Last modification date of the user */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the user record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configuration_details" (
  "detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration detail */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the JTAG configuration */,
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the JTAG signal */,
  "signal_value" TEXT /* Value or setting for the JTAG signal in the configuration */,
  "signal_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the signal in the configuration */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Last modification date of the configuration detail */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the configuration detail */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_details_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES jtag_configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the JTAG configuration being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the configuration */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the configuration was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used for access (e.g., Desktop, Mobile) */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Last modification date of the access log */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the access log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES jtag_configurations ("config_id")
)
